sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83777" key="plhqo/xwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πληθό-χωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing much,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
